name: ExtensionCitation_Classification
title: R5: The assignment to an organizing scheme (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Citation.classification` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Citation.classification` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Citation.classification` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Citation.classification` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Citation` is not mapped.
Element `Citation.classification` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The assignment to an organizing scheme (new)
element.comment:
Element `Citation.classification` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Citation` is not mapped.
Element `Citation.classification` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Use this element if you need to classify the citation record independently from classifying the cited artifact.

element.short: R5: The kind of classifier (e.g. publication type, keyword) (new)
